nasb.text: “Take also for yourself the finest of spices: of flowing myrrh five hundred shekels, and of fragrant cinnamon half as much, two hundred and fifty, and of fragrant cane two hundred and fifty,

esv.text: “Take the finest spices: of liquid myrrh 500 shekels, and of sweet-smelling cinnamon half as much, that is, 250, and 250 of aromatic cane,

cnv.text: “你要取最上等的香料，就是流質的沒藥六公升，香肉桂是沒藥的一半，就是三公斤，香昌蒲三公斤。

ccb.text: “要以圣所的秤为准，用上等的香料，就是没药液六公斤、香肉桂和菖蒲各三公斤、
